message.content:
Of course, here's a heartfelt and sincere message you can use:

---

Hi [Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I’ve been thinking a lot about us recently, and I wanted to reach out and express some things that have been on my mind. First and foremost, I’m truly sorry if there's anything I did that caused you pain. Regretting those moments is something I’ve been doing every day.

It means a lot to me to still be in your life. We share so many memories and if it weren’t for those, the last few events might not have had such an impact. I believe those memories are a significant part of who we both are, and I would love for us to move forward in a way that’s still respectful and meaningful.

Thank you for considering this, and please know that I value our [friendship/relationship] very much.

Warmly,

[Your Name]

---

You can adjust "friendship/relationship" based on your specific relationship with the person.
